mapper.select: SELECT mainClassifyCH,primaryName,secondaryName,tableCount,yesterdayRecordsSum,allRecordsSum,primarycodeid,secondarycodeid as secondaryClassifyCode FROM ( SELECT mainClassifyCH,primaryName,secondaryName,count(TABLE_PROJECT || TABLE_NAME_EN) AS tableCount, CASE WHEN sum(YESTERDAY_COUNT) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE sum(YESTERDAY_COUNT) END AS yesterdayRecordsSum, CASE WHEN sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) END AS allRecordsSum, primarycodeid,secondarycodeid FROM ( (SELECT DISTINCT SECONDARY_NAME AS secondaryName,PRIMARY_NAME AS primaryName, MAJOR_CLASS AS mainClassifyCH,primarycodeid,secondarycodeid FROM ( SELECT a3.PRIMARY_NAME,a3.primarycodeid,a3.DEL_FLAG,a3.MAJOR_CLASS,a3.SECONDARY_NAME,a3.last_level_classifycode as secondarycodeid FROM ( SELECT a1.PRIMARY_NAME,a1.SECONDARY_NAME,a1.DEL_FLAG,a1.MAJOR_CLASS,a2.CODEID AS primarycodeid,a1.last_level_classifycode FROM Focus_Organization_add_monitor a1 LEFT JOIN V_CLASSIFY_INFO a2 ON a1.PRIMARY_NAME=a2.CODETEXT) a3) k WHERE (k.major_class='数据组织分类' or k.major_class='原始库') AND k.del_flag=0) f1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH,TABLE_ALL_COUNT,YESTERDAY_COUNT,TABLE_NAME_EN,TABLE_PROJECT FROM ( SELECT case when t.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH='原始库' then t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH else t.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH end as PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, case when t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH like '%汇聚库%' or t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH like '%汇集库%' or t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH like '%标准库%' then t.THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH else t.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH end as SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, t.TABLE_ALL_COUNT,t.YESTERDAY_COUNT,t.TABLE_NAME_EN,t.TABLE_PROJECT,row_number () over (PARTITION BY TABLE_PROJECT,TABLE_NAME_EN ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) rn FROM table_organization_assets t where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate)) WHERE rn=1) t1 ON t1.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH=f1.primaryName AND (t1.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH=f1.secondaryname or (t1.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH is null and f1.secondaryname is null))) GROUP BY mainClassifyCH,primaryName,secondaryName,primarycodeid,secondarycodeid ORDER BY primarycodeid,secondarycodeid) UNION ALL SELECT mainClassifyCH,primaryName,secondaryName,tableCount,yesterdayRecordsSum,allRecordsSum,primarycodeid,secondarycodeid FROM ( SELECT mainClassifyCH,primaryName,secondaryName,count(TABLE_PROJECT || TABLE_NAME_EN) AS tableCount, CASE WHEN sum(YESTERDAY_COUNT) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE sum(YESTERDAY_COUNT) END AS yesterdayRecordsSum, CASE WHEN sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) END AS allRecordsSum, primarycodeid,secondarycodeid FROM ( (SELECT DISTINCT SECONDARY_NAME AS secondaryName,PRIMARY_NAME AS primaryName, MAJOR_CLASS AS mainClassifyCH,primarycodeid,secondarycodeid FROM ( SELECT b3.PRIMARY_NAME,b3.primarycodeid,b3.DEL_FLAG,b3.MAJOR_CLASS,b3.SECONDARY_NAME,b3.last_level_classifycode as secondarycodeid FROM ( SELECT b1.PRIMARY_NAME,b1.SECONDARY_NAME,b1.DEL_FLAG,b1.MAJOR_CLASS,b2.CODEID AS primarycodeid,b1.last_level_classifycode FROM Focus_Organization_add_monitor b1 LEFT JOIN V_CLASSIFY_INFO b2 ON b1.PRIMARY_NAME=b2.CODETEXT) b3) j WHERE major_class='数据来源分类' AND del_flag=0) f2 LEFT JOIN (SELECT PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH,SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,TABLE_ALL_COUNT,YESTERDAY_COUNT,TABLE_NAME_EN,TABLE_PROJECT FROM ( SELECT t.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH,t.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH,t.TABLE_ALL_COUNT,t.YESTERDAY_COUNT,t.TABLE_NAME_EN,t.TABLE_PROJECT,row_number () over (PARTITION BY TABLE_PROJECT,TABLE_NAME_EN ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) rn FROM table_organization_assets t where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate)) WHERE rn=1) t2 ON t2.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH=f2.primaryName AND (t2.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH=f2.secondaryname or (t2.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH is null and f2.secondaryname is null))) GROUP BY mainClassifyCH,primaryName,secondaryName,primarycodeid,secondarycodeid ORDER BY primarycodeid,secondarycodeid)

select distinct d.major_class as mainClassifyCH, primaryClassifyCode, d.primary_name as primaryClassifyCH, case when SECONDARYCLASSIFYCODE is null then d.last_level_classifycode else SECONDARYCLASSIFYCODE end as SECONDARYCLASSIFYCODE, d.secondary_name as SECONDARYCLASSIFYCH, 1 as alreadyInserted from Focus_Organization_add_monitor d left join (select * from (select '数据组织分类' as mainClassifyCH, CODEID as primaryClassifyCode, CODETEXT as primaryClassifyCH from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'JZCODEGASJZZFL' union all select '数据来源分类' as mainClassifyCH, CODEID as primaryClassifyCode, CODETEXT as primaryClassifyCH from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000404') a INNER join (select CODEID as SECONDARYCLASSIFYCODE, CODETEXT as SECONDARYCLASSIFYCH, PARCODEID from V_CLASSIFY_INFO) b on a.PRIMARYCLASSIFYCODE = b.PARCODEID) c on d.major_class = c.mainClassifyCH and d.primary_name= c.primaryClassifyCH and d.secondary_name = c.SECONDARYCLASSIFYCH
select primary_name||'_'||SECONDARY_NAME as secondaryClassifyCH from Focus_Organization_add_monitor
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO Focus_Organization_add_monitor (PRIMARY_NAME , SECONDARY_NAME , INSERT_TIME , DEL_FLAG,MAJOR_CLASS,USER_ID,USER_AUTHORITY_ID,USER_NAME,IS_ADMIN,LAST_LEVEL_CLASSIFYCODE)
select #{item.primaryClassifyCH,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.secondaryClassifyCH,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(to_char(sysdate,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'),'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'),0,#{item.mainClassifyCH,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.userAuthorityId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.isAdmin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.secondaryClassifyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual

INSERT INTO USER_AUTHORITY (id,cmn_memo,modulecode,modulename,iscreater,username,cmn_name,userid,create_time)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.cmnMemo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.moduleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isCreate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.cnmName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.delete: DELETE from USER_AUTHORITY where MODULECODE='ZCGL_ZDZZ' and USERID=#{userId}
mapper.select: select -- case when TABLENAMEZH is null then tablenameen else TABLENAMEZH end as TABLENAMEZH , TABLENAMEZH, TOTAL, case when TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' when TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' when TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' when TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'HIVE' when TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' else '' end as TABLETYPE from( select NAME as TABLENAMEZH ,tableen as tablenameen , sum(TABLEUSECOUNTOFDAY) as TOTAL, TABLETYPE from (select a.tableen,a.TABLETYPE,a.TABLEUSECOUNTOFDAY,b.NAME,b.TABLE_PROJECT from (select b.TABLETYPE,b.TABLEUSECOUNTOFDAY,substr(b.TABLENAMEEN,0,INSTR(b.TABLENAMEEN,'.')-1) as tableproject, substr(b.TABLENAMEEN,INSTR(b.TABLENAMEEN,'.')+1) as tableen from (select x.* from StoreCycleAndUseHeat x inner join synlte.object y on upper(substr(x.TABLENAMEEN,INSTR(x.TABLENAMEEN, '.') + 1)) = upper(y.tablename) where --x.tablenamezh is not null --根据东威控制objectstate是否为1决定数据是否展示 --and y.objectstate=1 and y.relate_tablename='OBJECTFIELD') b) a inner join table_organization_assets b on upper(a.tableen) = upper(b.TABLE_NAME_EN) and upper(a.tableproject) = upper(b.TABLE_PROJECT) where b.STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) ) group by NAME,tableen,TABLETYPE,TABLE_PROJECT order by TOTAL desc ) where rownum <9

select case when NAME is null then TABLENAME else NAME end as TABLENAMEZH, TRUNC(TABLE_ALL_COUNT / 100000000, 4) as total, tableType from (select DISTINCT TABLE_PROJECT || '.' || TABLE_NAME_EN AS TABLENAME,NAME,TABLE_ALL_COUNT,TABLE_TYPE as tableType from table_organization_assets a left join synlte.object b on a.sjxjbm = b.tableid where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) and STATISTICS_TIME < trunc(sysdate + 1 - #{daysAgo}) --根据姚秀梅要求改为统计全部数据量排行 --and PARTITION_MESSAGE = 1 and a.SJXJBM is not null and b.objectstate = 1 ORDER BY TABLE_ALL_COUNT desc nulls last) where rownum < 6

select case when NAME is null then TABLENAME else NAME end as TABLENAMEZH, TRUNC(YESTERDAY_COUNT / 100000000, 4) as total, tableType from (select DISTINCT TABLE_PROJECT || '.' || TABLE_NAME_EN AS TABLENAME, NAME, YESTERDAY_COUNT, TABLE_TYPE as tableType from table_organization_assets a left join synlte.object b on a.sjxjbm = b.tableid where a.STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate - #{daysAgo}) and a.STATISTICS_TIME < trunc(sysdate + 1 - #{daysAgo}) and a.PARTITION_MESSAGE = 0 --and upper(a.table_type) = 'ODPS' and a.SJXJBM is not null and b.objectstate = 1 ORDER BY YESTERDAY_COUNT desc nulls last) where rownum < 6

select CODETEXT as PRIMARY_CH,'数据组织分类' as MAINCLASS_CH from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'JZCODEGASJZZFL' UNION ALL select CODETEXT as PRIMARY_CH,'数据来源分类' as MAINCLASS_CH from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000404'
